friends.name: Sarah Chen
friends.bio: Met during freshman orientation at UC Berkeley. We bond over trail runs in the Bay Area and late-night study sessions that turned into lifelong friendship.

friends.name: Marcus Johnson
friends.bio: Senior product manager who took me under his wing when I joined the team. Always has great career advice and knows the best espresso spots downtown.

friends.name: Elena Rodriguez
friends.bio: Grew up next door to each other in Miami. Now she's teaching English in Barcelona, but we still video call every Sunday to catch up on life.

friends.name: David Kim
friends.bio: Met at a CrossFit box two years ago. We push each other during workouts and debate the latest AI developments over post-gym smoothies.

friends.name: Priya Patel
friends.bio: Found each other through a local mystery novel club. She's an incredible photographer who taught me to see beauty in everyday moments.

friends.name: Alex Thompson
friends.bio: Lives two doors down with the friendest golden retriever. We coordinate dog park visits and neighborhood watch duties. Need to reconnect soon!

friends.name: Jamal Williams
friends.bio: My college roommate who turned our dorm room into a makeshift recording studio. Now he's producing indie artists, and I'm his biggest fan.

friends.name: Sophie Martin
friends.bio: Met while backpacking through Southeast Asia. We've explored 12 countries together and still plan our next adventure over shared Google Docs.

friends.name: Ryan O'Connor
friends.bio: Been friends since 10th grade chemistry lab. Still team up for weekend gaming sessions and never let me forget that time I set the Bunsen burner too high.

friends.name: Aisha Okonkwo
friends.bio: Former director who became my career mentor. Her guidance helped me navigate my first promotion. I owe her a thoughtful check-in and coffee date.
